steps.title: Find the rock's intention
steps.content: The claim specifies that the rock intends to confront and restrain the sea. The quotation must explicitly show the rock stating this intention.

steps.title: Match the quotation to the claim
steps.content:
The correct answer features the rock declaring “I am set to encounter thee” (confronting) and “I am set here to limit thy power, and I will!” (restraining), with unmistakable language of intent.

The other three portray either the sea's attack or its dominance, not the rock's intention.

C is correct.
